title: Client Phone Call 客户电话
scene: 销售人员接听客户来电

lines.en: Good afternoon. This is Bright Tech. How may I help you?
lines.zh: 下午好，这里是Bright Tech。有什么可以帮您？

lines.en: Hi, I am calling about the order I placed last week.
lines.zh: 您好，我打电话是想问一下上周下的订单。

lines.en: Of course. Could you give me the order number?
Thank you. I see it here. It will be shipped tomorrow.
lines.zh: 谢谢。我查到了，明天会发货。

lines.en: That is good. Can you also send me the invoice by email?
lines.zh: 那很好。能同时把发票发到我邮箱吗？

lines.en: Absolutely. What is your email address?
lines.zh: 当然可以。您的邮箱地址是什么？

lines.en: It is john at greenfield dot com.
Got it. You will receive it within an hour. Thank you for calling.
lines.zh: 收到了。您会在一小时内收到。感谢您的来电。
